# SFSafariViewController.Configuration

**Class**

A configuration object that defines how a Safari view controller should be initialized.

## Declaration

```swift
class Configuration
```

## Overview

Use a configuration object with the [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariViewController/init(url:configuration:)] method to initialize your view controller.

## Configuring a Safari View Controller

- **entersReaderIfAvailable**: A value that specifies whether Safari should enter Reader mode, if it is available.
- **barCollapsingEnabled**
- **eventAttribution**: An object you use to send tap event attribution data to the browser for Private Click Measurement.

## Instance Properties

- **activityButton**

## Creating a View Controller

- **init(url:configuration:)**: Initializes and configures a Safari view controller that loads the specified URL.
- **init(url:)**: Initializes a Safari view controller that loads the specified URL.
- **init(url:entersReaderIfAvailable:)**: Initializes a Safari view controller that will load the specified URL, entering Reader mode if Reader mode is requested and available.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
